title: oSzoukaua's: Leaf Litter
description: A little datapack that makes decaying leaves drop leaf litter or petals on the ground!
body:
# Description: This Datapack/mod makes it so that once leaves natuarally decay, they will drop down a leaf litter that floats down to the ground, and gets placed! making leaf litter piles around chopped down trees, and pink petal piles around chopped down cherry trees!
![litter_leaf_example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed31ee9b3236e6ea943a8e26c88d89ce8d970132.gif)
## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
Discord @oSzoukaua
E-Mail Contact.oSzoukaua@gmail.com




Ko-Fi: ko-fi.com/oszoukaua Other: linktr.ee/oSzoukaua




## Technical details: This datapack changes the loot tables of all leaf blocks so that they drop a unique leaf_litter item (pink_petals for cherry trees) with the custom data data "oszu_ll:true", which in a tick will get deleted, and replaced with a litterpetal block display riding an invisible tiny armour stand falling down to the ground, the block display is randomly rotated as it falls, once the armour stands OnGround value is 1b, it and the visual will get deleted, and a litter/petal will attempt to be places/incremented/piled with surounding litter/petal blocks
